# CLAUDE.md

This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.

## Source of truth

**Always edit `readme.org`, never `init.el` or `early-init.el` directly.** These files are generated by `org-babel-tangle` from `readme.org`. The file-local variables at the bottom of `readme.org` prompt to tangle, reload, and optionally export to HTML on save.

To manually tangle: `M-x org-babel-tangle` inside `readme.org`.

## Structure

`readme.org` is a literate Emacs configuration organized into top-level sections:

| Section | Contents |
|---|---|
| Early init file | Tangled to `early-init.el` — disables `package.el`, strips GUI |
| Package management | Elpaca bootstrap and `use-package` integration |
| Emacs | Core variables, defaults, Evil (vim keybindings), General (leader keys), Avy, Which-key |
| Keybindings | Leader key (`SPC`) bindings via `general.el` |
| Appearance | Minions, icons, Olivetti, fonts, themes |
| Organization | Buffer management |
| Languages | Lua, Lisp, JS, Rust, Racket, Nix, Markdown, Lean 4 |
| Latex | AUCTeX, org-auctex, ebib (BibLaTeX) |
| Org | Org-roam, org-modern, org-noter, transclusion, export |
| Completion | Vertico + Orderless + Marginalia, Consult, Affe, Embark, Corfu |
| Checkers | Flymake, Jinx (spell) |
| Tools | PDF Tools, Magit, Eshell, LSP, direnv, Elfeed, Notmuch, Denote, Ace Window, Burly |
| Staging grounds | Experimental/in-progress config |

## Environment

- NixOS (hostnames: "wolfe", "vivacia"), Emacs 30.2, daemon mode
- Package manager: elpaca
- Packages installed via Nix (not elpaca): `pdf-tools`, `jinx`
- Emacs server socket: `/run/user/<UID>/emacs/server`

## Known runtime errors

These are pre-existing and not regressions:
- `agent-shell--start: Executable "claude-agent-acp" not found` — fires on every new frame; binary not installed
- `Error during redisplay: pdf-misc-size-indication signaled "Invalid image specification: nil"` — PDF Tools mode-line issue; likely version mismatch between nix pdf-tools and elpaca
- `Warning (elpaca): Init installer version does not match` — `elpaca-installer-version` in `readme.org`'s bootstrap block needs updating

## HTML export

`readme.org` exports to `docs/index.html` (GitHub Pages). The export setup is `theme-readtheorg.setup`. The file-local variable at the bottom of `readme.org` prompts to export on save.
